rat_meat.name: rat meat
rat_meat.sprite_desc: A raw slab of pinkish-brown rat meat with visible sinew, sitting on a rough wooden cutting board

goblin_flesh.name: goblin flesh
goblin_flesh.sprite_desc: A chunk of greenish-grey goblin flesh with a leathery hide edge, faintly glistening

snake_meat.name: snake meat
snake_meat.sprite_desc: A pale coil of boneless snake meat with a subtle green sheen, neatly sliced into medallions

fire_gland.name: fire gland
fire_gland.sprite_desc: A glowing orange-red organ sac pulsing with inner heat, tiny embers drifting from its surface

gnoll_hide.name: gnoll hide
gnoll_hide.sprite_desc: A patch of coarse tawny fur-covered hide with dark spots, rolled and tied with cord

troll_hide.name: troll hide
troll_hide.sprite_desc: A thick slab of mossy green troll hide with visible pores, still faintly regenerating at the edges

bear_meat.name: bear meat
bear_meat.sprite_desc: A dark red haunch of bear meat marbled with fat, resting on a bed of wild herbs

manticore_spine.name: manticore spine
manticore_spine.sprite_desc: A wickedly curved venomous spine in deep crimson-purple, barbed at the tip, leaking pale toxin

basilisk_stone.name: basilisk stone
basilisk_stone.sprite_desc: A smooth petrified stone organ with swirling grey-green mineral veins, cold to the touch

chimera_heart.name: chimera heart
chimera_heart.sprite_desc: A grotesque three-chambered heart in purple and red, each lobe from a different beast

frost_gland.name: frost gland
frost_gland.sprite_desc: A translucent ice-blue organ encased in a thin shell of frost crystals, radiating cold mist

medusa_blood.name: Medusa's Blood
medusa_blood.lore: The ichor of the Gorgon. From her right side flows poison; from her left, a healing draught.
medusa_blood.sprite_desc: A sealed glass vial of luminous green blood with faint serpentine shapes swirling within

dragon_scale.name: Dragon Scale
dragon_scale.lore: A gleaming scale of fireproof dragon hide. It smells of sulfur and ancient gold.
dragon_scale.sprite_desc: A single massive scale of burnished orange-gold with a molten shimmer along its razor edge

bronze_feather.name: bronze feather
bronze_feather.sprite_desc: A long metallic bronze feather with a lethal serrated edge, gleaming like polished weaponry

quasit_claw.name: quasit claw
quasit_claw.sprite_desc: A small curved demonic claw in deep purple-black, crackling with residual infernal energy

bone_shard.name: bone shard
bone_shard.sprite_desc: A jagged shard of yellowed bone with a sharp splintered edge, ancient and dry

rotted_flesh.name: rotted flesh
rotted_flesh.sprite_desc: A decomposing chunk of grey-green flesh wrapped in burial cloth, reeking of undeath

green_slime_extract.name: green slime extract
green_slime_extract.sprite_desc: A bubbling vial of bright green acidic gel with tiny dissolving particles suspended within

spider_silk.name: spider silk
spider_silk.sprite_desc: A shimmering bundle of silvery-white spider silk threads, impossibly thin yet strong as steel

frog_legs.name: frog legs
frog_legs.sprite_desc: A pair of plump pale-green frog legs tied together at the ankle, fresh and ready to cook

satyr_horn.name: satyr horn
satyr_horn.sprite_desc: A curved ridged horn of pale ivory with a warm amber base, faintly scented with pine resin

raven_feather.name: raven feather
raven_feather.sprite_desc: A sleek jet-black feather with an iridescent blue-purple sheen along its vane

scarab_shell.name: scarab shell
scarab_shell.sprite_desc: A polished teal-green scarab carapace with intricate geometric ridges and a golden underside

dretch_gland.name: dretch gland
dretch_gland.sprite_desc: A shriveled brownish-green demonic gland leaking foul yellowish ichor

imp_stinger.name: imp stinger
imp_stinger.sprite_desc: A needle-thin crimson stinger still glistening with infernal venom at its barbed tip

troglodyte_musk.name: troglodyte musk
troglodyte_musk.sprite_desc: A sealed clay jar of pungent olive-green musk that shimmers with oily iridescence

bullywug_leg.name: bullywug leg
bullywug_leg.sprite_desc: A muscular amphibian leg with mottled green-brown skin and webbed toes

warrior_bone.name: warrior bone
warrior_bone.sprite_desc: A polished femur bone from an undead warrior, etched with faded battle runes

bone_marrow.name: bone marrow
bone_marrow.sprite_desc: A cracked bone filled with pale pinkish-cream marrow, rich and gelatinous

yellow_spores.name: yellow spores
yellow_spores.sprite_desc: A glass vial packed with bright golden-yellow fungal spores that drift and swirl

beetle_shell.name: beetle shell
beetle_shell.sprite_desc: A dark emerald beetle carapace with a hard glossy surface and saw-toothed edges

lizard_meat.name: lizard meat
lizard_meat.sprite_desc: A lean slab of pale greenish-white lizard flesh with fine scales still attached

sea_snake_venom.name: sea snake venom
sea_snake_venom.sprite_desc: A small blue-glass vial of translucent cyan venom with tiny crystalline flecks

pixie_dust.name: pixie dust
pixie_dust.sprite_desc: A pouch of sparkling lavender-pink dust that floats upward when disturbed

myconid_spore.name: myconid spore
myconid_spore.sprite_desc: A soft purple-brown mushroom cap releasing a haze of pale violet spores

empusa_ichor.name: empusa ichor
empusa_ichor.sprite_desc: A vial of hot magenta ichor that pulses with a faint seductive warmth

grave_dust.name: grave dust
grave_dust.sprite_desc: A leather pouch of fine grey-brown dust that smells of ancient earth and decay

changeling_glamour.name: changeling glamour
changeling_glamour.sprite_desc: A shimmering opalescent orb of liquid light that shifts color when tilted

demon_claw.name: demon claw
demon_claw.sprite_desc: A thick curved claw of blackened red chitin, cracked and still radiating heat

homunculus_blood.name: homunculus blood
homunculus_blood.sprite_desc: A tiny flask of deep violet blood that moves with unnatural purpose inside the glass

gray_slime.name: gray slime
gray_slime.sprite_desc: A sealed jar of thick silvery-grey ooze that slowly shifts and reforms on its own

piercer_shell.name: piercer shell
piercer_shell.sprite_desc: A conical stalactite-shaped shell of striated brown and grey stone, razor-sharp at the tip

paralytic_venom.name: paralytic venom
paralytic_venom.sprite_desc: A stoppered vial of pale chartreuse venom that numbs on contact with skin

lizardfolk_scale.name: lizardfolk scale
lizardfolk_scale.sprite_desc: A tough overlapping scale of mottled green and brown, trimmed with a horn edge

arcane_bone_dust.name: arcane bone dust
arcane_bone_dust.sprite_desc: A pouch of finely ground bone powder with faint violet arcane sparks dancing within

charred_bone.name: charred bone
charred_bone.sprite_desc: A blackened bone fragment scorched by hellfire, still warm and smelling of ash

frost_bone.name: frost bone
frost_bone.sprite_desc: A bone shard encased in a thin shell of permanent ice, cold mist rising from its surface

plague_flesh.name: plague flesh
plague_flesh.sprite_desc: A chunk of sickly grey-green flesh covered in weeping sores and wrapped in cloth

brown_mold_patch.name: brown mold patch
brown_mold_patch.sprite_desc: A dried patch of fuzzy brown mold on bark, releasing faint warmth-draining cold

wasp_venom.name: wasp venom
wasp_venom.sprite_desc: A bright amber vial of giant wasp venom, viscous and faintly buzzing with energy

mud_crawler_hide.name: mud crawler hide
mud_crawler_hide.sprite_desc: A patch of thick mud-brown hide caked with dried clay and tiny embedded stones

lucky_clover.name: lucky clover
lucky_clover.sprite_desc: A perfect four-leaf clover of vivid emerald green with a faint golden aura

toxic_thorn.name: toxic thorn
toxic_thorn.sprite_desc: A long barbed thorn of deep green with black veins, dripping slow purple poison

spore_cloud_vial.name: spore cloud vial
spore_cloud_vial.sprite_desc: A sealed glass vial of swirling yellow-green gas with tiny spore particles suspended within

goblin_crown_dust.name: goblin crown dust
goblin_crown_dust.sprite_desc: A pouch of glittering gold-green dust scraped from a goblin king's crude crown

shadow_fur.name: shadow fur
shadow_fur.sprite_desc: A tuft of impossibly dark fur that seems to absorb light, cold and silky to the touch

khepri_carapace.name: khepri carapace
khepri_carapace.sprite_desc: A sacred scarab shell of brilliant teal-blue with golden hieroglyphic markings

puca_hair.name: puca hair
puca_hair.sprite_desc: A lock of wild purple-black hair that shifts between animal textures: fur, mane, feather

enchanted_wood.name: enchanted wood
enchanted_wood.sprite_desc: A chunk of living wood still faintly glowing with green veins of magical sap

kobold_scale.name: kobold scale
kobold_scale.sprite_desc: A tiny rust-orange scale with a rough texture, lightweight but surprisingly tough

darkmantle_membrane.name: darkmantle membrane
darkmantle_membrane.sprite_desc: A sheet of thin rubbery dark purple membrane that ripples with residual shadow magic

zombie_flesh.name: zombie flesh
zombie_flesh.sprite_desc: A grey-green slab of decomposing flesh held together with black stitching

thrall_blood.name: thrall blood
thrall_blood.sprite_desc: A stoppered crystal vial of deep crimson blood that refuses to coagulate

cairn_stone.name: cairn stone
cairn_stone.sprite_desc: A smooth flat river stone etched with ancient warding symbols, cold as grave earth

hollow_bone.name: hollow bone
hollow_bone.sprite_desc: A thin translucent bone fragment, completely empty inside, light as paper

bone_arrow.name: bone arrow
bone_arrow.sprite_desc: A slender arrow carved entirely from yellowed bone with a needle-sharp tip

crystal_residue.name: crystal residue
crystal_residue.sprite_desc: A glistening cluster of translucent blue-white crystal fragments in a pool of clear gel

toxic_jelly_sac.name: toxic jelly sac
toxic_jelly_sac.sprite_desc: A bulging translucent green sac of corrosive jelly, wobbling with each movement

scorpion_venom_sac.name: scorpion venom sac
scorpion_venom_sac.sprite_desc: A tough amber-colored venom sac with a sharp stinger still attached at one end

wild_thyme.name: wild thyme
wild_thyme.lore: A hardy aromatic herb that grows in the cracks of dungeon walls. Cooks prize it as a versatile flavoring that subtly sharpens the senses.
wild_thyme.sprite_desc: A bundle of delicate green-grey thyme sprigs tied with twine, fragrant and fresh

rosemary_sprig.name: rosemary sprig
rosemary_sprig.lore: A woody-stemmed herb whose resinous scent has been known to ward off minor hexes. Adventurers crush it in their palms before entering cursed chambers.
rosemary_sprig.sprite_desc: A woody sprig of dark green rosemary needles with tiny pale blue flowers

valerian_root.name: valerian root
valerian_root.lore: A gnarled root with sedative properties. Herbalists dry and powder it to calm nerves; master cooks transmute it into a potent focus-enhancing tonic.
valerian_root.sprite_desc: A gnarled pale brown root with stringy tendrils, smelling of earth and sleep

nightshade_leaf.name: nightshade leaf
nightshade_leaf.lore: A deep-violet leaf from a poisonous plant. In small, precisely cooked doses it sharpens reflexes to a razor edge—but miscalculate and the result is lethal.
nightshade_leaf.sprite_desc: A single heart-shaped leaf of deep purple-black with veins that glow faintly violet

mandrake_root.name: mandrake root
mandrake_root.lore: A humanoid-shaped root infamous for its screech when pulled. Ground and slow-roasted by an expert cook, it imparts a formidable boost to raw physical power.
mandrake_root.sprite_desc: A twisted humanoid-shaped root of pale brown, its surface etched with tiny screaming faces

cave_mushroom.name: cave mushroom
cave_mushroom.lore: A pale, plump mushroom grown in the darkness of deep caverns. Bland on its own, but a skilled cook can render it into a surprisingly nourishing meal.
cave_mushroom.sprite_desc: A plump off-white mushroom with a broad cap, speckled with bits of cave sediment

pale_celery.name: pale celery
pale_celery.lore: Etiolated celery stalks that grow in underground streams. Water-rich and faintly bitter, they form the base of many dungeon soups.
pale_celery.sprite_desc: A stalk of ghostly pale celery grown in total darkness, crisp and translucent

cave_carrot.name: cave carrot
cave_carrot.lore: Orange roots that somehow flourish in dimly lit passages. Rich in subterranean minerals, they are said to grant keen eyesight in the dark.
cave_carrot.sprite_desc: A stubby bright orange carrot pulled from underground soil, still dusted with dark earth

glowing_spore.name: glowing spore
glowing_spore.lore: A bioluminescent spore cluster that pulses with soft blue-green light. Ingesting it in a refined preparation briefly heightens magical sensitivity.
glowing_spore.sprite_desc: A luminous blue-green spore cluster pulsing with soft bioluminescent light

crimson_fungus.name: crimson fungus
crimson_fungus.lore: Blood-red caps with a fiery bite. Herbalists warn never to eat these raw—the toxins must be rendered harmless through careful cooking before the energizing compounds can be safely absorbed.
crimson_fungus.sprite_desc: A vivid red mushroom cap with white spots, its underside dripping crimson spores

petrified_mushroom.name: petrified mushroom
petrified_mushroom.lore: Ancient fungi turned to near-stone over centuries of mineral exposure. Ground to a fine dust and boiled, they yield a broth of remarkable fortifying properties.
petrified_mushroom.sprite_desc: A stone-hard mushroom turned to grey mineral, its cap still showing fossilized gills

ember_spice.name: ember spice
ember_spice.lore: Tiny flakes of solidified volcanic mineral, glowing faintly orange. Sprinkled into a dish they intensify flavors and imbue a transient heat-resistance.
ember_spice.sprite_desc: A small clay pot of brilliant orange-red spice powder that smolders with faint heat

serpent_pepper.name: serpent pepper
serpent_pepper.lore: A slender, venomously-hot pepper found near serpent dens. Cooking neutralizes its toxins and leaves behind a compound that sharpens dexterity for hours.
serpent_pepper.sprite_desc: A twisted dark green pepper pod shaped like a coiled snake, intensely hot

void_salt.name: void salt
void_salt.lore: Crystallized residue from extra-planar rifts. A grain transforms any dish into something otherworldly—and grants brief resistance to necrotic energies.
void_salt.sprite_desc: A pouch of deep indigo-black crystalline salt that seems to swallow nearby light

dragon_salt.name: dragon salt
dragon_salt.lore: Crystalline deposits found only in dragon lairs, formed when draconic flame meets limestone. Chefs who master its use produce meals of legendary restorative power.
dragon_salt.sprite_desc: Brilliant golden crystalline salt that sparkles like molten treasure in any light

swamp_serpent_fang.name: swamp serpent fang
swamp_serpent_fang.sprite_desc: A curved yellow-green fang dripping with brackish swamp venom

blink_gland.name: blink gland
blink_gland.sprite_desc: A pulsating lavender organ that flickers in and out of visibility

eagle_feather.name: eagle feather
eagle_feather.sprite_desc: A broad tawny-gold eagle feather with a sharp white tip and powerful barbs

wisp_essence.name: wisp essence
wisp_essence.sprite_desc: A tiny glass sphere containing a flickering pale blue-white light that dances within

spriggan_thorn.name: spriggan thorn
spriggan_thorn.sprite_desc: A woody green thorn the size of a dagger, alive with crawling vine tendrils

violet_fungus_cap.name: violet fungus cap
violet_fungus_cap.sprite_desc: A fleshy purple mushroom cap with writhing tentacle-like gills underneath

lamia_scales.name: lamia scales
lamia_scales.sprite_desc: A handful of golden-bronze scales with a hypnotic iridescent pattern

wolf_pelt.name: wolf pelt
wolf_pelt.sprite_desc: A thick patch of grey-brown wolf fur, dense and warm with a wild musky scent

nothic_eye.name: nothic eye
nothic_eye.sprite_desc: A large bloodshot eye with a slit pupil, still twitching with mad awareness

enchanted_plate.name: enchanted plate
enchanted_plate.sprite_desc: A shard of animated steel armor plate with faint blue runes still glowing

shaman_totem.name: shaman totem
shaman_totem.sprite_desc: A carved wooden totem of stacked animal heads, daubed with ritual paint

kuo_toa_slime.name: kuo-toa slime
kuo_toa_slime.sprite_desc: A jar of iridescent teal-green fish slime that shifts through rainbow colors

cockatrice_beak.name: cockatrice beak
cockatrice_beak.sprite_desc: A sharp hooked beak of stone-grey keratin with petrifying residue on its edge

grick_hide.name: grick hide
grick_hide.sprite_desc: A rubbery section of mottled grey-green hide covered in tiny suction cups

ghast_ichor.name: ghast ichor
ghast_ichor.sprite_desc: A sealed jar of putrid yellow-green fluid that paralyzes living tissue on contact

false_holy_relic.name: false holy relic
false_holy_relic.sprite_desc: A tarnished gold medallion radiating false divine warmth, cracked down the center

phase_silk.name: phase silk
phase_silk.sprite_desc: A shimmering fabric of purple-silver silk that phases between solid and translucent

python_scales.name: python scales
python_scales.sprite_desc: A strip of large overlapping olive-green scales with a muscular hide backing

heartwood_sap.name: heartwood sap
heartwood_sap.sprite_desc: A flask of rich amber-gold sap that glows with the vitality of ancient forests

assassin_vine_sap.name: assassin vine sap
assassin_vine_sap.sprite_desc: A dark green viscous sap that coils and reaches toward nearby warmth

carbuncle_gem.name: carbuncle gem
carbuncle_gem.sprite_desc: A luminous ruby-red gemstone that was once embedded in a living creature's forehead

bronze_hide_strip.name: bronze hide strip
bronze_hide_strip.sprite_desc: A strip of metallic bronze-scaled hide that rings like metal when struck

world_serpent_scale.name: world serpent scale
world_serpent_scale.sprite_desc: A large emerald-green scale with shifting cosmic patterns visible in its depth

solar_venom.name: solar venom
solar_venom.sprite_desc: A radiant golden vial of liquid sunlight venom that burns shadows on contact

hero_hound_pelt.name: hero hound pelt
hero_hound_pelt.sprite_desc: A patch of noble golden-brown hound fur with an aura of loyalty and courage

shadow_essence.name: shadow essence
shadow_essence.sprite_desc: A small black crystal vial containing liquid darkness that writhes and recoils from light

ochre_extract.name: ochre extract
ochre_extract.sprite_desc: A thick amber-yellow gel that slowly dissolves anything organic it touches

pack_lord_skull.name: pack lord skull
pack_lord_skull.sprite_desc: A large gnoll skull with filed fangs and tribal scarification carved into the bone

ettercap_silk.name: ettercap silk
ettercap_silk.sprite_desc: A bundle of strong purple-grey silk webbing with a faint magical shimmer

jiangshi_essence.name: jiangshi essence
jiangshi_essence.sprite_desc: A paper talisman soaked in pale blue-green ectoplasmic fluid, still twitching

barrow_dust.name: barrow dust
barrow_dust.sprite_desc: Ancient grey dust from a burial mound, mixed with crumbled gold leaf and bone

hollow_essence.name: hollow essence
hollow_essence.sprite_desc: A glass orb of perfectly clear liquid that weighs nothing and reflects no light

charnel_fang.name: charnel fang
charnel_fang.sprite_desc: A massive yellowed canine tooth stained with old blood and smelling of the charnel pit

mantis_foreleg.name: mantis foreleg
mantis_foreleg.sprite_desc: A segmented green foreleg with a razor-sharp serrated inner edge for slicing prey

basilisk_eye.name: basilisk eye
basilisk_eye.sprite_desc: A clouded amber eye with a vertical pupil, still radiating faint petrification magic

winter_wolf_pelt.name: winter wolf pelt
winter_wolf_pelt.sprite_desc: A luxurious coat of pure white fur with ice crystals woven permanently into each strand

death_dog_fang.name: death dog fang
death_dog_fang.sprite_desc: A double-pointed fang from a two-headed death dog, blackened with necrotic poison

tengu_feather.name: tengu feather
tengu_feather.sprite_desc: A jet-black crow feather with a metallic blue edge, cut like a blade

musk_pollen.name: musk pollen
musk_pollen.sprite_desc: A pouch of brilliant yellow pollen that induces euphoria and suggestibility when inhaled

cyclops_eye.name: cyclops eye
cyclops_eye.sprite_desc: A massive single eye the size of a fist, amber-orange with a horizontal pupil

griffin_feather.name: griffin feather
griffin_feather.sprite_desc: A magnificent golden-brown feather tipped with white, radiating noble pride

corrupted_elf_dust.name: corrupted elf dust
corrupted_elf_dust.sprite_desc: A pouch of once-luminous silver dust now tainted with creeping purple corruption

crocodile_hide.name: crocodile hide
crocodile_hide.sprite_desc: A section of thick ridged crocodilian hide in dark olive-green, nearly impenetrable

desert_sand_essence.name: desert sand essence
desert_sand_essence.sprite_desc: A glass vial of golden sand that flows upward and whispers in dead languages

demon_ichor.name: demon ichor
demon_ichor.sprite_desc: A sealed bronze flask of bubbling black-red ichor that corrodes lesser containers

mouther_ichor.name: mouther ichor
mouther_ichor.sprite_desc: A jar of grey-pink fleshy fluid with dozens of tiny embedded eyes staring outward

clockwork_gear.name: clockwork gear
clockwork_gear.sprite_desc: A precision brass gear with microscopic rune engravings on every tooth

owlbear_feather.name: owlbear feather
owlbear_feather.sprite_desc: A large brown feather with a downy base and an owl-like pattern, smelling of musk

otyugh_organ.name: otyugh organ
otyugh_organ.sprite_desc: A bloated grey-green organ sac that reeks of refuse and pulses with bacterial life

phase_spider_venom.name: phase spider venom
phase_spider_venom.sprite_desc: A vial of shimmering purple venom that blinks between dimensions inside the glass

vrykolakas_heart.name: vrykolakas heart
vrykolakas_heart.sprite_desc: A blackened undead heart that still beats slowly, leaking dark blood

thrall_bone.name: thrall bone
thrall_bone.sprite_desc: A thin grey bone inscribed with binding runes, warm to the touch from residual necromancy

witch_bone.name: witch bone
witch_bone.sprite_desc: A finger bone wrapped in silver wire and tiny charm beads, humming with hex magic

crypt_dust.name: crypt dust
crypt_dust.sprite_desc: A vial of grey teleportation dust from a crypt thing, crackling with spatial energy

guardian_bone.name: guardian bone
guardian_bone.sprite_desc: A thick reinforced bone etched with protective wards, still faintly glowing blue

gibbering_essence.name: gibbering essence
gibbering_essence.sprite_desc: A sealed jar of writhing pink flesh-fluid that babbles incoherently when disturbed

komodo_venom_gland.name: komodo venom gland
komodo_venom_gland.sprite_desc: A leathery brown gland packed with bacterial venom that causes rapid infection

lion_meat.name: lion meat
lion_meat.sprite_desc: A thick slab of dark red lion meat with powerful muscle fibers, rich and gamey

roc_egg_fragment.name: roc egg fragment
roc_egg_fragment.sprite_desc: A curved shard of enormous eggshell, thick as pottery and veined with pale gold

redcap_blood.name: redcap blood
redcap_blood.sprite_desc: A vial of unnaturally bright crimson blood that never dries, constantly wet and fresh

elemental_air_core.name: elemental air core
elemental_air_core.sprite_desc: A swirling sphere of compressed wind contained in a thin crystal shell, humming

peryton_antler.name: peryton antler
peryton_antler.sprite_desc: A branching antler of pale bone-white with dried blood staining its tines

giant_marrow.name: giant marrow
giant_marrow.sprite_desc: A massive bone cracked open to reveal rich yellow marrow the size of a loaf

yuan_ti_venom_sac.name: yuan-ti venom sac
yuan_ti_venom_sac.sprite_desc: A serpentine venom gland with green-gold scales still attached, dripping clear poison

winged_mane.name: winged mane
winged_mane.sprite_desc: A flowing lock of pure white horse mane hair that drifts upward as if weightless

lindworm_skin.name: lindworm skin
lindworm_skin.sprite_desc: A shed skin of emerald-green dragon-kin, translucent and surprisingly tough

embalming_resin.name: embalming resin
embalming_resin.sprite_desc: A block of golden-brown resin wrapped in linen strips, fragrant with sacred oils

each_uisce_mane.name: each uisce mane
each_uisce_mane.sprite_desc: A lock of waterlogged black-blue mane hair that drips endlessly and smells of the sea

ugallu_claw.name: ugallu claw
ugallu_claw.sprite_desc: A massive curved claw of dark brown horn, cracked and scarred from battle

kusarikku_horn.name: kusarikku horn
kusarikku_horn.sprite_desc: A heavy ridged horn of deep amber, warm to the touch and carved with Sumerian glyphs

grell_tentacle.name: grell tentacle
grell_tentacle.sprite_desc: A severed grey-green tentacle lined with paralytic barbs, still twitching

infernal_perfume.name: infernal perfume
infernal_perfume.sprite_desc: An ornate black bottle of intoxicating perfume that smells different to each person

devil_glaive_shard.name: devil glaive shard
devil_glaive_shard.sprite_desc: A jagged shard of infernal black iron still glowing dull red along its edge

lurker_skin.name: lurker skin
lurker_skin.sprite_desc: A paper-thin membrane of mottled brown that mimics stone and ceiling textures

mineral_shard.name: mineral shard
mineral_shard.sprite_desc: A faceted crystal of mixed precious minerals: gold, silver, and gems fused together

hook_horror_hook.name: hook horror hook
hook_horror_hook.sprite_desc: A massive bone hook the length of a forearm, curved and wickedly sharp

strigoi_fang.name: strigoi fang
strigoi_fang.sprite_desc: An elongated ivory fang with dried blood in its hollow channel, radiating cold

death_mage_phylactery.name: death mage phylactery
death_mage_phylactery.sprite_desc: A small obsidian box etched with death runes, pulsing with trapped soul energy

mohrg_organ.name: mohrg organ
mohrg_organ.sprite_desc: A purple-red muscular tongue-organ studded with paralytic barbs

death_beetle_ichor.name: death beetle ichor
death_beetle_ichor.sprite_desc: A vial of deep purple-black beetle ichor that dims nearby light sources

lycanthrope_blood.name: lycanthrope blood
lycanthrope_blood.sprite_desc: A flask of dark blood that shifts between human red and bestial amber with the light

hag_eye.name: hag eye
hag_eye.sprite_desc: A milky green eye that still sees, swiveling to track movement when uncovered

elemental_water_core.name: elemental water core
elemental_water_core.sprite_desc: A perfect sphere of living water that hovers slightly above any surface

troll_regeneration_gland.name: troll regeneration gland
troll_regeneration_gland.sprite_desc: A pulsing green organ that visibly regrows damaged tissue before your eyes

minotaur_horn.name: Minotaur Horn
minotaur_horn.lore: A massive curved horn from the Minotaur of Knossos. Radiates primal fury.
minotaur_horn.sprite_desc: A massive curved horn of dark crimson-brown, scarred from charging through stone walls

sphinx_mane.name: sphinx mane
sphinx_mane.sprite_desc: A lock of luxurious golden lion mane radiating ancient wisdom and desert heat

frost_giant_bone.name: frost giant bone
frost_giant_bone.sprite_desc: A femur of pale blue-white bone taller than a human, rimed with permanent frost

corruption_scale.name: corruption scale
corruption_scale.sprite_desc: A blackened dragon scale corroded with creeping purple-red corruption veins

sphinx_dust_gold.name: sphinx dust gold
sphinx_dust_gold.sprite_desc: Sacred golden dust from a sphinx guardian, each grain containing a fragment of a riddle

thoth_ink.name: thoth ink
thoth_ink.sprite_desc: A vial of deep blue-black ink that writes words of power on its own when uncapped

fomorian_bone.name: fomorian bone
fomorian_bone.sprite_desc: A massive twisted bone from a deformed giant, asymmetrical and covered in growths

cath_palug_claw.name: cath palug claw
cath_palug_claw.sprite_desc: A curved obsidian-black claw from the monstrous cat, still humming with feral power

primordial_clay.name: primordial clay
primordial_clay.sprite_desc: A lump of ancient red-brown clay that reshapes itself when not being observed

brain_lobe.name: brain lobe

cloaker_hide.name: cloaker hide

enchanted_clay.name: enchanted clay

displacer_hide.name: displacer hide

black_ooze.name: black ooze

trapper_membrane.name: trapper membrane
trapper_membrane.sprite_desc: A wide flat membrane of stone-colored skin that could cover an entire floor tile

revenant_heart.name: revenant heart

nue_tail_quill.name: nue tail quill

drow_poison_extract.name: drow poison extract

ember_ash.name: ember ash

anzu_feather.name: anzu feather

eyestalk.name: eyestalk
eyestalk.sprite_desc: A severed beholder eyestalk still swiveling, its tip glowing with residual antimagic

devil_chain_link.name: devil chain link

shield_core.name: shield guardian core

soul_fragment.name: soul fragment

storm_feather.name: storm feather

sphinx_claw.name: sphinx claw

orc_blood.sprite_desc: A crude clay pot of dark green-tinted blood, thick and metallic-smelling

void_essence.lore: Crystallized nothingness scraped from the Destroyer's form. It absorbs light and hums with terrible potential.

wolf_meat.name: wolf meat

slime_core.sprite_desc: A dense green orb at the center of a dissolved slime, pulsating with acidic energy

arachne_silk_gland.sprite_desc: A bulbous silver-white gland trailing impossibly fine silk threads of divine craftsmanship

nemean_pelt_scrap.sprite_desc: A scrap of invulnerable golden lion hide that no blade can cut, warm as sunlight

baba_yaga_mortar_dust.sprite_desc: Grey stone dust from a flying mortar, smelling of ancient Russian forests and impossible magic

sets_jackal_fang.name: set's jackal fang

green_knight_sap.name: green knight sap

nidhoggr_root_shard.sprite_desc: A shard of Yggdrasil root gnawed by the world-serpent, dark with corruption and ancient power

mammon_hunger_crystal.name: mammon's hunger crystal

bael_war_shard.sprite_desc: A blood-red iron shard from a demon general's blade, still seeking flesh to cut

samael_death_vial.name: samael's death vial
samael_death_vial.sprite_desc: A tiny vial of absolute stillness, the distilled essence of death itself

prime_beef.name: prime beef
prime_beef.lore: A thick cut of marbled beef from a Hell Bovine. Despite its infernal origins, it smells absolutely delicious. Moo.

royal_beef.name: royal beef
royal_beef.lore: An exquisite cut of beef from the Cow King himself. The meat shimmers with a faint golden hue. Fit for royalty. Moo.
